ui.page.title: Meow Control Center
ui.onboarding.step1.title: Welcome to N.E.K.O.
ui.onboarding.step1.desc: This is a robot control terminal tailored for you. Complex setup should feel as easy as petting a cat.
ui.onboarding.step2.title: Connect to OneBot Seamlessly
ui.onboarding.step2.desc: WebSocket is supported. Just enter the address and token to take over your bot core in seconds.
ui.onboarding.step3.title: Manage Lists Freely
ui.onboarding.step3.desc: Configure your trusted users and group chats here. All changes are synced to local cache in real time.
ui.config.url.label: Connection URL
ui.config.token.label: Access Token
ui.footer.autosave: Data is saved locally as you make changes.
ui.status.title: Runtime Status
ui.toast.readonly_manage: This version wires real backend state first; add/remove actions will come next
